emails.subject: Mid-Year Performance Evaluation (Jodie)
emails.body: Mid-Year Performance Evaluation (Jodie) Please email me a copy of Jodie Floyd's mid-year 2001 performance evaluation. I would like to update it for year end. Thanks. Rick

emails.subject: RE: Mid-Year Performance Evaluation (Jodie)
emails.body: RE: Mid-Year Performance Evaluation (Jodie) Rick, here is Jodie's Mid Year review. Thanks. Lynn To: Blair, Lynn

emails.subject: RE: Mid-Year Performance Evaluation (Jodie)
emails.body: RE: Mid-Year Performance Evaluation (Jodie) Lynn, I am under the assumption that you are preparing the year-end evaluation on Mike Bodnar. My only input would be to be encouraging on how quickly (and acceptingly) he has caught on to the basics of his new contract administration duties.
